description: This Certified 2025 Mazda CX-30 2.5 S Select Sport, has a Ceramic Metallic exterior and an Black interior color. 5,032 miles.  Stock Number SM825821. You can connect with us by calling (407) 681-2222.     No Accidents!  One Owner!   OTHER NOTABLE FEATURES AND OPTIONS YOU SHOULD KNOW ABOUT:    Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.     You can't buy the wrong car. Exchange or return your vehicle within 5-days / 300-miles for a full refund.We price our cars, not our Customers. Our Best Price is clearly marked on every vehicle, saving you time and money by taking the stress of negotiating out of the car buying experience.

description: The automotive industry has seen many changes over the last century, but at Dobbs Brothers, our foundational principles remain unshakable. As the fourth generation of the most trusted name in the business, we are leading the charge Back to Better. We recognize that a dealerships "Technical Authority" is found in the integrity of its sales process. This 2024 GMC Yukon SLT is an incredible value, positioned well below market value after a thorough analysis of current Tri-State market data. We have a strict, family-enforced policy against pre-loaded addendums. You will never see a price increase on our lot for nitrogen-filled tires or "environmental protection packages" that offer zero mechanical advantage to you as a buyer.  Mechanically, the 2024 Yukon SLT is built on a high-strength, fully boxed steel frame, providing the torsional rigidity required for a quiet cabin and confident towing. The 5.3L V8 engine utilizes Dynamic Fuel Management to optimize power and efficiency by deactivating cylinders when full power isn't needed. This unit also features the 12-inch diagonal digital Driver Information Center and a premium Bose 9-speaker audio system, technically designed for an immersive acoustic experience. With 75,508 miles, this Summit White Yukon has been thoroughly vetted by our technicians to ensure its powertrain and suspension systems are functioning at peak performance.  Every vehicle in our inventory undergoes a comprehensive mechanical evaluation. Our goal is to be the only place you will ever want to purchase a vehicle or service a vehicle for the rest of your life. By eliminating the "add-on games" and gimmicks that have become all too common, we allow you to focus on the technical merits and market-leading value of your next SUV. When you choose the fourth generation of the Dobbs family, you are choosing a partner who values transparency as much as you do. Since 1921, we have focused on providing great cars at a great value, and we are proud to continue that legacy today. Its time to move Back to Better with a dealership that stands behind its cars and its prices. Rediscover the name Memphis has trusted for over 100 years at the all-new, locally owned and operated Dobbs Brothers Chevrolet. With no-nonsense pricing, no games, and no gimmicks, we aim to provide an experience so great that you won't ever want to buy a vehicle from anyone else. Tech and visibility are covered, too, with **navigation aid**, **steering wheel mounted controls**, **automatic headlights**, and bright **LED low beams** plus **daytime running lights**. Recent Arrival! 2024 Hyundai Elantra SEL FWD Ecotronic Gray CVT I4 31/40 City/Highway MPG Crenshaw Hyundai is family owned and operated. The founder Charles Crenshaw, born in Kings Mountain and raised in Alamance county North Carolina and a sergeant in the Marine Corps, began his career in 1959 working for Atwater Ford in Burlington. He worked for the Atwaters until 1977, at that point he went into business for himself, starting a Datsun dealership in Sanford, NC. In the winter of 1982 he had the opportunity to return to his home in Burlington, NC and he and Terry Crenshaw have been operating Carolina Nissan since then. In the fall of 2005, after interviewing many candidates, Hyundai approached  and the Crenshaw family to find out if they would be interested in opening a Hyundai franchise in Burlington. Crenshaw Hyundai opened in Jan. Of 2008. Mr. Crenshaw was awarded the Hyundai franchise because of his experience and leadership and customer satisfaction in their sales, service and parts departments and because of his commitment to: Put the Customer First! description: The 2024 Chevrolet Trax LT is a compact SUV that offers exceptional value and a wealth of premium features. With its sleek exterior design, efficient powertrain, and host of advanced technologies, this vehicle is the perfect blend of practicality and sophistication.   Driver Confidence Package  LT Convenience Package  Wrapped Steering Wheel  Keyless Open  Rear Park Assist  Adaptive Cruise Control  Heated Power-Adjustable Outside Mirrors  Heated Steering Wheel  Lane Change Alert with Side Blind Zone Alert  Rear Cross-Traffic Alert  Heated Driver & Front Passenger Seats  Powered by a 1.2L Ecotec Turbo DOHC DI engine with VVT, the Trax LT delivers an impressive 28 city/32 highway MPG, ensuring you can conquer your daily commute with ease. The 6-speed automatic transmission and front-wheel drive configuration provide a smooth and responsive driving experience, while the available all-weather floor liners keep your interior protected from the elements.  The Trax LT's cabin is both stylish and functional, with premium cloth/Evotex seat trim, a 6-way manual driver's seat, and a 4-way manual front passenger seat. The split-folding rear seat and generous cargo space make it easy to accommodate your lifestyle, whether you're transporting large items or taking the family on a weekend getaway.  Chevrolet's Infotainment 3 system with a 7-inch color touchscreen keeps you connected and entertained, with features like SiriusXM radio, Apple CarPlay, and Android Auto. The available Driver Confidence and LT Convenience Packages add even more convenience and peace of mind, with features like Rear Park Assist, Rear Cross-Traffic Alert, Heated Seats, and a Heated Steering Wheel.  Safety is a top priority in the Trax LT, with a comprehensive suite of advanced driver-assistance technologies, including Automatic Emergency Braking, Lane Keep Assist, and Forward Collision Alert. You can drive with confidence, knowing that you and your passengers are well-protected.  Whether you're looking for a practical daily driver or a versatile family SUV, the 2024 Chevrolet Trax LT is an exceptional choice. With its impressive features, efficient performance, and commitment to safety, this vehicle is sure to exceed your expectations.  Fox Chevrolet has been delivering on a promise since 1967. description: Distinguished 2024 Kia Forte LXS Sedan - Modern Safety and Superior ComfortThe 2024 Kia Forte LXS Sedan exudes refinement and reliability, making it an exceptional choice for those seeking both style and advanced technology in a pre-owned vehicle. With its elegant gray exterior and sophisticated black interior, this sedan offers a harmonious blend of contemporary design and thoughtful engineering. Every drive is enhanced by a suite of notable features, ensuring both comfort and security for all occupants. Key Features:  Forward Collision Warning - Proactively alerts the driver to potential frontal impacts for added safety.   Lane Departure Warning System - Monitors lane position and provides warnings to help prevent unintended departures.   Backup Camera - Facilitates precise maneuvering and parking with clear rear visibility.   Bluetooh Wireless - Enables convenient hands-free connectivity for calls and audio streaming. description: CARFAX One-Owner. Certified. Nebula Gray Pearl 2024 Lexus GX 550 Luxury+ 4WD 10-Speed Automatic 3.4L V6 Carfax 1-Owner, CLEAN CARFAX!!, Cold Area Package, LOCAL TRADE IN!!!, Luxury Plus Package, Navigation System, Traffic Jam Assist.  Every L/Certified Lexus includes LexusCare, an industry-leading suite of standard benefits that goes beyond your Lexus Dealership to include a comprehensive warranty, complimentary maintenance services, comprehensive roadside assistance, connected services trial subscriptions and so much more. Each L/Certified by Lexus vehicle undergoes a comprehensive inspection including: engine, exterior, interior, electronics, safety devices, undercarriage and a road test. During the inspection process, we focus on the details. Lexus trained technicians inspect every aspect of the pre-owned vehicle, right down to the first aid kit, spare tire and glovebox light. Lexus confidently stands behind these exceptional vehicles, which when combined with the new-vehicle Basic Warranty, can provide up to six years of vehicle warranty coverage. Mileage is unlimited. From the day you purchase or lease your L/Certified Vehicle, you receive Complimentary Maintenance covering the next four factory-recommended services for two years or20,000 miles, whichever comes first. Every L/Certified vehicle comes with the reassurance of Lexus Roadside Assistance coverage that is 24/7 for two years/unlimited miles within the Limited Warranty period.  Recent Arrival!  The 2024 Lexus GX 550 Luxury+ is the perfect blend of rugged capability and premium refinement, built for drivers who want true offroad power without sacrificing comfort or style. This redesigned SUV carries a bold, squared-off stance that instantly commands attention, with signature triple beam LED headlights and a confident, modern grille that make it look every bit as capable as it is.  Inside, the Luxury+ trim surrounds you with upscale materials and thoughtful craftsmanship. Semi-aniline leather, beautifully stitched surfaces, and real wood accents create a cabin that feels warm, inviting, and unmistakably high end. The seats are heated and ventilated in both the first and second rows, and the power folding third row gives you versatility whether you're hauling passengers or gear. A massive 14inch touchscreen, Mark Levinson premium audio system, and a fully digital gauge cluster deliver a tech experience that's crisp, intuitive, and effortlessly luxurious.  On the road, or far off it, the GX 550 Luxury+ shines with its new twin turbo V6 engine, delivering strong, smooth power with impressive towing capability. Lexus pairs that strength with a refined ride, adaptive suspension, and a sturdier new platform built for real adventure. Whether you're navigating city streets, snowy mountain passes, or rugged trails, it feels confident, composed, and ready for anything.  The 2024 GX also steps up big in safety and convenience with Lexus Safety System+ 3.0, a surround view camera, and advanced parking assist that make maneuvering this SUV surprisingly easy. Overall, the 2024 Lexus GX 550 Luxury+ is ideal for someone who wants first class comfort, advanced tech, and genuine offroad credibility in one beautifully executed package. It's powerful, premium, and built to handle life's biggest journeys, on and off the pavement. description: Discover the ultimate work van in the 2024 GMC Savana 2500 Work Van. This versatile and capable vehicle is designed to handle your toughest jobs with ease, delivering the power, utility, and convenience you need to get the job done right.  Boasting an impressive array of features, the Savana 2500 Work Van is the perfect companion for your business. Enjoy the convenience of a Backup Camera, Cruise Control, Power Windows, Power Locks, and Steering Wheel Radio Controls, all standard for your comfort and convenience. The Aluminum Wheels and Running Boards add a touch of style, while the DRIVER CONVENIENCE PACKAGE and CHROME APPEARANCE PACKAGE elevate the van's functionality and appearance.   Backup Camera  Cruise Control  Power Windows  Power Locks  Steering Wheel Radio Controls  Aluminum Wheels  Running Boards  DRIVER CONVENIENCE PACKAGE  CHROME APPEARANCE PACKAGE  Cruise Control  Tilt Steering Wheel  Front & Rear Chrome Bumpers w/Step-Pad  Chrome Grille  Under the hood, the powerful 4.3L V6 engine paired with an 8-Speed Automatic Transmission with Overdrive delivers the performance you need to tackle any job, large or small. With the rear-wheel-drive configuration, you'll have the traction and control to navigate even the most challenging terrain.  Stepping inside, you'll be greeted by a spacious and well-appointed cabin that prioritizes both comfort and functionality. The Jet Black/Medium Dark Pewter, Cloth/Vinyl Seat Trim provides a durable and stylish seating solution, while the Front Bucket Seats with Inboard Armrests offer exceptional support and convenience.  Whether you're transporting large cargo, hauling heavy equipment, or simply need a reliable and versatile work van, the 2024 GMC Savana 2500 Work Van is the answer. With its impressive capabilities, thoughtful features, and rugged design, this van is the perfect tool for the job.  Experience the power and capability of the 2024 GMC Savana 2500 Work Van for yourself. Visit our showroom today and let us demonstrate how this exceptional vehicle can transform the way you work. description: Atamian Honda takes extra steps to ensure every pre-owned vehicle meets our high standards before it reaches you. Each vehicle is thoroughly inspected by our experienced techniciansbrakes, tires, battery, and lighting systems are all checked for performance and safety. We also review essential components like the cooling system, transmission, and drivetrain. For gas-powered vehicles, we perform a full oil and filter change and inspect the exhaust system. Finally, every vehicle is professionally detailed inside and out, so its showroom-ready when you take the keys. Please click the Service Records to learn more about this vehicle.  Looking for a reliable, community-rooted Honda dealership near you? Atamian Honda in Tewksbury, MA has proudly served local drivers since 1924. From humble beginnings, our family-owned dealership has grown into a trusted name for new and used Honda vehicles across Middlesex County.  Located at 150 Main Street right off Route 38 and I-495 our facility offers a full lineup of new Honda models like the Civic, CR-V, Ridgeline, and Pilot, plus a wide selection of quality pre-owned vehicles. description: Discover the ultimate driving experience with the 2024 Mazda CX-30 2.5 S Premium Package. This exceptional crossover SUV combines style, performance, and cutting-edge technology to elevate your daily commute and weekend adventures.  Boasting a comprehensive suite of premium features, the CX-30 2.5 S Premium Package is designed to exceed your expectations. Enjoy the convenience of the MAZDA CONNECT Infotainment System, featuring a 12-speaker audio system, navigation, and seamless smartphone integration through Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. Stay connected and informed with the Heads-Up Display, while the Mazda Connected Services provide an added layer of security and convenience.   Navigation system: MAZDA CONNECT  12 Speakers  AM/FM radio: SiriusXM  MAZDA CONNECT Infotainment System  Heads-Up Display  Memory seat  Power driver seat  Power moonroof  Power Liftgate  Exterior Parking Camera Rear  Comfort and style are paramount in the CX-30, with features like heated front seats, leather-wrapped steering wheel, and a power-adjustable driver's seat with memory function. The spacious cabin and versatile cargo area ensure you can accommodate your passengers and belongings with ease.  Beneath the sleek exterior lies the impressive SKYACTIV® 2.5L 4-Cylinder DOHC 16V engine, paired with a 6-speed automatic transmission and Mazda's renowned all-wheel-drive system. This powertrain delivers an exceptional balance of power and efficiency, with an EPA-estimated 26 mpg in the city and 33 mpg on the highway.  The CX-30 2.5 S Premium Package also boasts a comprehensive suite of advanced safety features, including Mazda Connected Services, ABS brakes, Electronic Stability Control, and a suite of airbags to provide you and your loved ones with peace of mind on the road. description: 2025 Chevrolet Silverado 2500HD LT 4WD Heavy-Duty Muscle with Everyday Comfort!Get ready to command every job and adventure with this bold and capable 2025 Chevrolet Silverado 2500HD LT 4WD a true powerhouse that combines rugged capability, modern tech, and dependable performance in a full-size heavy-duty truck built for serious drivers.Rugged Performance Towing StrengthThis Silverado 2500HD packs serious grunt with a 6.6-liter V8 engine paired to a smooth 10-speed automatic transmission and a part-time 4WD system, giving you the strength to haul, tow, and conquer tough terrain without breaking a sweat. Depending on configuration, payload capacity tops over 3,400 lbs and heavy-duty towing can reach around 18,500 lbs or more perfect for trailers, boats, or big equipment.Classic Silverado PresenceStand tall with a commanding exterior that blends rugged durability with bold Chevrolet design. Chrome accents, strong body lines, and a muscular stance make this truck look as capable as it feels ready for the worksite, the trail, or the highway with confidence. Standard 17-inch wheels and the EZ-Lift tailgate with power lock and release add both style and practicality to every load.Tech Comfort That Works Hard TooInside the LT cabin youll enjoy a 13.4-inch Chevrolet Infotainment touchscreen with Google built-in, wireless smartphone integration, and a large 12.3-inch digital driver display that keeps essential info right in your view. Keyless entry and start, thoughtful storage, and ergonomic controls make daily driving and long hauls more enjoyable.Confident On- Off-RoadWith 4WD and rugged engineering, this Silverado handles tough conditions from muddy job-site ramps to snowy backroads. Whether youre navigating construction zones or weekend trails, it delivers sure-footed traction and durability you can trust.Built for the Long HaulHeavy-duty reliability is part of every Silverado 2500HD reinforced towing systems, strong chassis strength, and dependable drivetrain hardware help make every journey safer and more secure, mile after mile.

description: This  2025 CHEVROLET Trax 1LT, has a  exterior and an  interior color. 12,370 miles.  Stock Number T243170B. You can connect  with us by calling 734-636-0839    No Accidents!  One Owner!   OTHER NOTABLE FEATURES AND OPTIONS YOU SHOULD KNOW ABOUT:  LT Convenience Package ($595 value)Front Doors Keyless OpenHeated Power-Adjustable Outside MirrorsHeated Driver and Front Passenger SeatsWrapped Steering WheelHeated Steering WheelDriver Confidence Package ($795 value)Adaptive Cruise ControlRear Park AssistRear Cross-Traffic AlertLane Change Alert with Side Blind Zone AlertPreferred Equipment Group 1LT    Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift.  With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane.  Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.Technology and Telematics Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.     At Allen Chevrolet - MI, we're here to Serve you!  Our staff is 100% dedicated to customer satisfaction and we understand that you need clear, transparent information throughout the car buying process.  With our live market pricing philosophy, we offer the right cars at the right price, and the transparency to back it up!

Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. description: Introducing the 2025 Kia K4 GT-Line, featuring an array of impressive packages including the *GT-Line Premium Package* and *GT-Line Sunroof Package*. This sleek sedan is powered by a dynamic 2L I-4 DOHC engine, delivering a robust 147 horsepower with a smooth CVT transmission, making it a perfect choice for those who value both performance and efficiency on the road.  Safety is a top priority in the Kia K4 GT-Line, equipped with cutting-edge features designed to enhance your driving experience. The innovative **hands-on cruise control** allows drivers to set their desired speed while maintaining a safe distance from surrounding vehicles, turning long drives into enjoyable journeys without the hassle of constant adjustments.  The **forward collision mitigation** system is another standout feature, activating when it detects the likelihood of a collision. This proactive approach helps to minimize accident severity, ensuring you stay protected on the road. Complementing this is the **front pedestrian impact prevention** system, which continuously scans the roadway for pedestrians, taking necessary actions to avert potential collisions.  On winding roads, the **automatic curve slowdown cruise control** utilizes GPS data to adjust your speed, optimizing comfort and fuel economy. The **rear camera** enhances safety by providing a clear view of obstacles behind the vehicle, making reversing maneuvers easier and safer.  The **lane departure prevention** system adds an extra layer of safety by helping you stay centered in your lane, while the **rear collision mitigation** system monitors the area behind the vehicle, alerting you to potential hazards as you reverse.  In urban settings, the **adaptive cruise control with traffic stop-go** feature is invaluable. It automatically maintains a safe distance from the vehicle ahead, coming to a complete stop when needed and resuming speed as traffic clearsideal for daily commutes.  Finally, the **brake assist** feature enhances your stopping power in emergencies, ensuring you can react swiftly to unexpected obstacles on the road.  In summary, the 2025 Kia K4 GT-Line seamlessly blends performance, safety, and advanced technology into a stylish package. Whether navigating city streets or cruising down the highway, this vehicle is tailored to meet your every need. description: This  2024 Toyota Sienna XLE, has a  exterior and  interior color with only 43,916 miles.  Stock Number FU9425.     Important Package Information  Safety and Security Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift.  With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane.  Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you. Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. description: Are you searching for a high-capacity, luxury SUV in the Metro Memphis area that is loaded with features but find yourself frustrated by the "hidden fees" at other dealerships? At Dobbs Brothers, we are taking the Mid-South Back to Better. We are the fourth generation of the Dobbs family, and we have remained the most trusted name in the automotive business since 1921 by honoring our word. Unlike many big-box dealers in Memphis and the surrounding Tri-State area, we do not charge for pre-loaded addendums like nitrogen in tires or forced paint and fabric protection. We believe in honoring our advertised prices without playing games or adding high-priced items you never asked for at the final moment of the sale. This 2024 Expedition MAX Limited is currently priced below market value, offering an incredible opportunity to own a near-new flagship at a pre-owned price.  Technically, the 2024 Expedition MAX Limited is a masterclass in power and space. Built on a 131.6-inch wheelbase, the "MAX" configuration provides nearly 12 inches of additional length over the standard Expedition, translating into a massive 36.0 cubic feet of cargo space behind the third row. Powered by the high-output 3.5L EcoBoost V6 engine and a 10-speed SelectShift automatic transmission, this SUV delivers 400 horsepower and 480 lb-ft of torque, with a maximum towing capacity of up to 9,000 lbs. This unit is technically loaded, featuring the Panoramic Vista Roof, heated and ventilated Mahogany Leather Captain's Chairs, and a premium 12-speaker B&O Sound System by Bang & Olufsen. The Ford Co-Pilot360 Assist+ suite provides a technical safety net, including Adaptive Cruise Control, Lane Centering, and Evasive Steering Assist.  Our aim is to be the only place you will ever want to purchase a vehicle or service a vehicle ever again. This Black Metallic Expedition MAX has been rigorously evaluated in our state-of-the-art service department to ensure it meets our multi-generational standards for excellence. By removing the "junk fees" and the "add-on games," we allow the engineering and market-leading value of this Limited trim to speak for itself. Experience a transparent process that respects your intelligence and your time. Its time to go Back to Better with the fourth generation of the Dobbs family. Rediscover the name Memphis has trusted for over 100 years at the all-new, locally owned and operated Dobbs Brothers Chevrolet. With no-nonsense pricing, no games, and no gimmicks, we aim to provide an experience so great that you won't ever want to buy a vehicle from anyone else. description: Introducing the 2024 GMC Sierra 2500HD Denali Ultimate - a true powerhouse that blends uncompromising capability with exceptional luxury and technology. Packed with an impressive array of features, this Sierra 2500HD Denali Ultimate is designed to elevate your driving experience. Whether you're hauling heavy loads, tackling off-road adventures, or simply enjoying the open road, the 2024 GMC Sierra 2500HD Denali Ultimate is the ultimate companion. The 8-way power driver seat with lumbar support ensures personalized comfort, while heated front seats and a heated steering wheel keep you warm on chilly mornings. A spacious interior with a flat-folding front passenger seatback and split-folding rear seats offers incredible versatility for all your cargo needs. description: Discover the exceptional value of this 2024 Toyota Corolla Hybrid LE, a fuel-efficient and feature-rich compact car that's ready to elevate your driving experience. With its sleek blue exterior and a host of advanced technologies, this Corolla Hybrid is the perfect blend of style, efficiency, and convenience.  Boasting an impressive array of features, this Corolla Hybrid LE offers:   Apple CarPlay / Android Auto  Adaptive Cruise Control  Backup Camera  Bluetooth  Cruise Control  Power Windows  Power Locks  Steering Wheel Radio Controls  Beyond these impressive amenities, this Toyota Corolla Hybrid is also equipped with a robust set of safety features, including Remote Keyless Entry, Traction Control, ABS Brakes, Low Tire Pressure Warning, Electronic Stability Control, and Active Cruise Control, ensuring your peace of mind on every journey.  As a Toyota Certified Pre-Owned (CPO) vehicle, this Corolla Hybrid has undergone a rigorous 160-point inspection and comes with a comprehensive warranty package. Enjoy the confidence of Roadside Assistance, a $0 Warranty Deductible, a Transferable Warranty, and a Limited Comprehensive Warranty for 12 Months/12,000 Miles, as well as a Powertrain Limited Warranty for 84 Months/100,000 Miles. This CPO certification is backed by the trusted Toyota brand, with warranty coverage honored at over 1,400 Toyota dealers across the U.S. and Canada.  Powered by a 1.8L 4-Cylinder SMPI Hybrid DOHC engine and equipped with a Continuously Variable Transmission (CVT) and Front-Wheel Drive, this Corolla Hybrid delivers an exceptional fuel economy of 53 MPG in the city and 46 MPG on the highway, making it an ideal choice for the eco-conscious driver.  With just 22,060 miles on the odometer, this 2024 Toyota Corolla Hybrid LE presents an exceptional opportunity to own a well-maintained, fuel-efficient, and feature-rich compact car. Backed by Toyota's renowned reliability and the additional assurance of the CPO program, this Corolla Hybrid is the perfect blend of practicality, efficiency, and value.  We invite you to experience the exceptional quality and capabilities of this 2024 Toyota Corolla Hybrid LE. description: Why BUY from Dahl Honda Rhinelander?     When you choose this  2024 CHEVROLET TRUCK COLORADO 4WD Z71 with 15,310 miles, you are not just buying a used vehicle - you are investing in quality, reliability and peace of mind. Our clientele depend on us for Transparent Pricing, Convenience and, most importantly, Customer FIRST Service!           What this vehicle includes:                                                                                                            Advanced Trailering Package ($620 value)Trailering AppHeavy-Duty Trailering PackageZ71 Convenience Package II ($1,625 value)8-Way Power Driver Seat AdjusterPower Driver Lumbar Control Seat AdjusterTailgate Keyed Cylinder LockStowFlex Tailgate Storage CompartmentRemote Vehicle Starter SystemDual-Zone Automatic Air ConditioningInside Rearview Auto-Dimming MirrorWireless ChargingHeated Driver and Front Passenger SeatsTilt and Telescoping Steering ColumnEZ-Lift and Lower TailgateSafety Package ($445 value)Rear Park AssistRear Cross Traffic BrakingBlind Zone Steering Assist with TraileringTechnology Package ($950 value)Adaptive Cruise ControlRear Pedestrian AlertHD Surround VisionPreferred Equipment Group 4Z7Rear-Window Electric DefoggerElectronic Automatic Cruise ControlChevy Safety Assist        Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.     Come on in to Dahl Honda Rhinelander today at 1737 N Stevens St Rhinelander WI 54501 or call  to schedule a test drive!

Under the hood, the RS trim is exclusively powered by the spirited 1.3-liter ECOTEC Turbo engine, which produces a responsive 155 horsepower and 174 lb-ft of torque, expertly paired with the highly efficient Continuously Variable Transmission (CVT) in FWD configurations (or a 9-speed automatic if AWD is present, though FWD typically delivers the best MPG). Ventilated front seats provides targeted cool air so you and your passenger can get comfortable quicker in hot weather. Getting comfortable is no sweat when you have ventilated front seats. Heated steering wheel - A warm touch. Trying to drive with bulky winter gloves on isn't always easy. Keep your hands warm in cold temperatures so you can ditch the mitts and get a firm grip with this heated steering wheel. Heated rear seats - That's hot. Heated rear seats provide more targeted warmth so passengers can get comfortable quicker in cold weather. If they have lower back pain, they might also be soothed by the heat during the drive. No matter the weather, find comfort in the heated rear seats. Heated driver and front passenger seat cushions - That's hot. Leather seat upholstery - superior sitting. There's more class in the cabin with leather seat upholstery. The leather material is luxurious to the touch, offers a distinctive look, and is easy to clean. Put a little luxury behind you with leather seat upholstery. Power reclining driver seat - Lean back. Gain some space between you and the wheel with power reclining driver seat. It lets you adjust the angle of the seatback at the touch of a button for added comfort while you're driving, or for a more comfortable rest while you're pulled over. Settle in, with power reclining driver seat. Power reclining driver seat - Lean back. Gain some space between you and the wheel with power reclining driver seat. It lets you adjust the angle of the seatback at the touch of a button for added comfort while you're driving, or for a more comfortable rest while you're pulled over. Settle in, with power reclining driver seat.Convenience Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go. Set it and forget it.  Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety.  Now, with Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and the vehicle ahead.  It's stop/go feature automatically brings the vehicle to a stop if traffic stops and  resumes distance pacing cruise when traffic starts to move again.  Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go; your ultimate co-pilot. Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Smart device and keyfob engine start control - Phone ahead.  Remotely start your vehicle's engine from the key fob or your smart device, ensuring your ride is ready to go when you get in. Now you can stay comfortable inside while your vehicle gets comfortable outside, ,thanks to Smart device and Keyfob engine start control. Power open and close liftgate - On-demand access. When your arms are full of cargo, the last thing you want to do is set it all down just to open the liftgate, then pick it all back up to load it in. By remotely opening and closing, power liftgate lets you skip straight to the loading. It also eliminates the awkward stretch to reach up for the liftgate to close it. Load and go with power open and close liftgate. Keyfob engine start control - Get an early start.  Remotely start your vehicle's engine from the key fob, ensuring your ride is ready to go when you get in. Now you can stay comfortable inside while your vehicle gets comfortable outside, thanks to Keyfob engine start control.Exterior and Appearance First-row power express open/close sunroof - Let more of the outside in. Now you can be in the sun or gaze at the stars from the comfort of your seat, and have a more open cabin during your drive. With one touch of a button, The first-row power express open/close sunroof is a breath of fresh air.In-car Entertainment Touchscreen - flat out convenient. Say goodbye to the twists and turns of your daily drive...we're talking about buttons and knobs of course! Touchscreen allows you to control certain features with your fingertips, making it easy to use while also providing information at a glance. With touchscreen, your fingerprints will be all over your drive.Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift.  With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane.  Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you. Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one. Rear collision warning - It has your back.  This system uses sensors to monitor the area behind you.  If it senses an impending crash, it alerts you so you can take steps to prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it.  Rear collision warning, a second set off eyes watching over you.Technology and Telematics Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot. Voice activated integrated navigation system - A to B made easy! Whether it's an errand or a road trip, the voice activated integrated navigation system will guide you to your destination.  No more bulky, impossible-to-fold maps, and no more stopping to ask for directions. Just tell it where you want to go, and the voice activated integrated navigation system shows you the right way. With its striking White exterior and a host of premium features, this SUV is poised to elevate your driving experience to new heights. The 3.0L EcoBoost V6 engine, paired with a responsive 10-speed automatic transmission and 4-wheel drive, delivers an exhilarating driving experience. With an impressive 18 city/24 highway MPG, this Explorer ST strikes the perfect balance between power and efficiency.  The interior of this SUV is a symphony of luxury and technology. Sink into the heated and ventilated leather-trimmed seats, which offer superior comfort and support. The 10.1" LCD touchscreen, part of the optional Technology Package, provides seamless integration with your smartphone via SYNC 3 and Apple CarPlay/Android Auto. The premium B&O sound system by Bang & Olufsen will immerse you in a concert-hall-quality audio experience.  Safety and convenience are also at the forefront of this Explorer ST. The Ford Co-Pilot360 Assist+ suite of driver-assist technologies, including Evasive Steering Assist and Intelligent Adaptive Cruise Control, help keep you and your passengers secure on the road. The Power Liftgate and 360-Degree Camera with Split View make navigating tight spaces a breeze.  As a Ford Gold Certified pre-owned vehicle, this Explorer ST has undergone a rigorous 172-point inspection and comes with a comprehensive warranty package. Enjoy the peace of mind of a transferable warranty, roadside assistance, and 22,000 FordPass Rewards Points to use toward your first two maintenance visits.  Experience the pinnacle of performance, technology, and luxury with this exceptional 2024 Ford Explorer ST. Important Package and Feature Information      Safety and Security Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Rear collision mitigation - It has your back.  Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you.  If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back! description: This 2025 Hyundai Tucson SEL, has a Serenity White Pearl exterior and an Gray interior color. 3,496 miles.  Stock Number SH542080. You can connect with us by calling (407) 628-4343.   Wheels: 18 Alloy, Power Liftgate Rear Cargo Access, 2 LCD Monitors In The Front, Heated Front Bucket Seats -inc: 8-way power driver's seat w/2-way power lumbar support and adjustable head restraints       OTHER NOTABLE FEATURES AND OPTIONS YOU SHOULD KNOW ABOUT:    Convenience Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go. Set it and forget it.  Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety.  Now, with Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and the vehicle ahead.  It's stop/go feature automatically brings the vehicle to a stop if traffic stops and  resumes distance pacing cruise when traffic starts to move again.  Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go; your ultimate co-pilot.Safety and Security Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.Technology and Telematics Apple CarPlay & Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring  TOW HITCH, ALL SEASON FITTED LINERS, CARGO TRAY, FIRST AID KIT   At Holler Hyundai, all of our vehicles are clearly marked with our haggle-free best price and our sales associates are commission-free. description: Discover the exceptional 2025 Mazda CX-50 Hybrid Premium Plus, a true gem in the world of crossover SUVs. With its sleek Polymetal Gray Metallic exterior and a wealth of premium features, this vehicle is poised to captivate your senses and elevate your driving experience. The front dual-zone climate control, heated and ventilated seats, and the intuitive heads-up display ensure your comfort and convenience are uncompromised.  Powered by a 2.5L 4-cylinder engine and paired with Mazda's advanced Hybrid system, the CX-50 delivers an exceptional fuel economy of 39 MPG in the city and 37 MPG on the highway, making it a true eco-friendly companion.  The CX-50's impressive safety features, including the Exterior Parking Camera Rear and the comprehensive suite of Mazda's i-Activsense technologies, provide you and your loved ones with the utmost protection on the road.  Elevate your driving experience with the CX-50's premium amenities, such as the power moonroof, power liftgate, and the seamless integration of Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. The memory seat function and the HomeLink garage door transmitter add an extra touch of convenience to your daily commute. description: This 2025 CHEVROLET EQUINOX LT is offered in WHITE with  interior, and has 15,610 miles.        Preferred Equipment Group 1LT  Convenience Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go. Set it and forget it.  Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety.  Now, with Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and the vehicle ahead.  It's stop/go feature automatically brings the vehicle to a stop if traffic stops and  resumes distance pacing cruise when traffic starts to move again.  Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go; your ultimate co-pilot. Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.Safety and Security Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Rear collision mitigation - It has your back.  Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you.  If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation. Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift.  With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane.  Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you. Active blind spot system - Protect your blind side. You checked the mirror, looked over your shoulder and still nearly collided with the car next to you. An active blind spot system not only alerts you to the presence of a vehicle to your sides or rear but helps prevent you from making an unsafe lane change.  Replace fear and uncertainty with the confidence and safety of the Active blind spot system. Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.Technology and Telematics Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.  Please give us a call or stop by... Let us show you how we pride ourselves in consistently exceeding our customer's expectations.   Janssen and Sons Ford  1222 West Highway 6 Holdrege NE 68949 308-995-4418

description: This 2025 CHEVROLET EQUINOX LT is offered in WHITE with  interior, and has 14,858 miles.        Preferred Equipment Group 2LT235/65R17 All-Season Blackwall Tires  Convenience Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go. Set it and forget it.  Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety.  Now, with Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and the vehicle ahead.  It's stop/go feature automatically brings the vehicle to a stop if traffic stops and  resumes distance pacing cruise when traffic starts to move again.  Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go; your ultimate co-pilot. Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.Safety and Security Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Rear collision mitigation - It has your back.  Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you.  If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation. Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift.  With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane.  Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you. Active blind spot system - Protect your blind side. You checked the mirror, looked over your shoulder and still nearly collided with the car next to you. An active blind spot system not only alerts you to the presence of a vehicle to your sides or rear but helps prevent you from making an unsafe lane change.  Replace fear and uncertainty with the confidence and safety of the Active blind spot system. Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.Technology and Telematics Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.  Please give us a call or stop by... Let us show you how we pride ourselves in consistently exceeding our customer's expectations.   Janssen and Sons Ford  1222 West Highway 6 Holdrege NE 68949 308-995-4418
